reports.name: Audit Across Register
reports.description: Full audit log of all actions performed on a register within a date range.

reports.name: Certificate Range Analysis
reports.description: Distribution of certificate holdings across defined ranges.

reports.name: KYC Changes Log
reports.description: All KYC field changes within a date range.

reports.name: Negative Holdings Report
reports.description: Shareholders with zero or negative share holdings.

reports.name: All Dividend Declared List
reports.description: Full list of all dividend declarations with rates, gross, WHT, net amounts and current status.

reports.name: WHT Deduction Report
reports.description: Per-shareholder withholding tax deductions for a specific dividend.

reports.name: Unpaid Dividend Register
reports.description: All shareholders with outstanding unpaid warrants.

reports.name: Register of Members
reports.description: Full shareholder register with account details, holdings, and status.

reports.name: Holders by Stockbroker
reports.description: Shareholder holdings grouped and subtotalled by stockbroker.

reports.name: Dormant Accounts Report
reports.description: Accounts with no transaction activity for a specified number of months.

reports.name: SEC Monthly Return
reports.description: Statutory monthly return to the Securities and Exchange Commission.
